coaching_recommendations.title: Address recording setup before deepening narration coaching
coaching_recommendations.summary: Both narration (none) and recording (poor) are below ideal. Improving the recording channel first will let later narration coaching land more reliably; isolated narration and recording recommendations are suppressed in favour of this combined item.
advice: Resolve recording-setup issues — microphone clarity, ambient noise, clipping — before pushing for richer narration.
Re-state think-aloud expectations to the participant only after the recording channel is reliable, so verbalisation is captured cleanly.
Treat current narration-quality readings as lower-confidence until recording stabilises.
coaching_recommendations.evidence_note: 5.1-B narration=none ∧ recording=poor; isolated narration / recording recommendations are suppressed in favour of this meta item.
